patch.value: Items with release field matching a known git tag bucket to that section; items without release field fall back to timestamp window. Empty release windows are omitted unless includeEmpty is set. The generator runs release-field bucketing first, then timestamp filtering for remaining items, guaranteeing each item appears in exactly one section.
Bucket items by release field in full-history changelog

Add release-field-aware bucketing so items with an explicit release: field appear in their tagged release section, eliminating duplicate Unreleased entries when pm update --release bumps updated_at after the tag was created.
Items with release field matching a known git tag bucket to that section; items without release field fall back to timestamp window; empty release windows are omitted unless includeEmpty is set.
items with release field bucket correctly in --all-release-tags mode
items with release field bucket correctly; empty windows omitted; 31 tests pass

value.author: claude
value.text: Replaces the previous timestamp-only filtering in --all-release-tags mode that misplaced items into Unreleased after their release field was stamped.

value.author: claude
value.text: Adds optional releaseTag field to ChangelogReleaseWindow; release-context populates this when scanning git tags.

value.author: claude
value.text: Closed pm items typically get their release field stamped AFTER the git tag is created, so updated_at sorts them into the wrong release window with the legacy timestamp filter.

author: claude
message: align release field with published tag v2026.05.25
